scenarios.name: Stuck-at Sensor Fault
scenarios.description: Sensor frozen at a constant DC offset with no fundamental frequency component.
scenarios.detection_mechanism: THD fail-closed (infinite THD, zero fundamental power)

scenarios.name: Phase Connection Swap
scenarios.description: Phase A and C swapped, breaking the 120-degree three-phase balance.
scenarios.detection_mechanism: FDI physics layer (noise-floor or balance check)

scenarios.name: Intermittent Burst Corruption
scenarios.description: 52-sample burst of extreme values (10.0) within an otherwise clean waveform.

scenarios.name: Additive Gaussian Noise
scenarios.description: Large Gaussian noise (sigma=0.5) added to unit-amplitude waveform.

scenarios.name: Sensor Saturation (Clipping)
scenarios.description: Waveform hard-clipped at +/-0.3, simulating ADC saturation.
scenarios.detection_mechanism: THD exceeds 5% limit (odd harmonics from clipping)

scenarios.name: Multi-Phase Coordinated Bias
scenarios.description: Small simultaneous biases on all three phases (A+2.5%, B-2%, C+1.5%) with realistic sensor noise.
scenarios.detection_mechanism: FDI physics layer (fused joint score or individual check)

scenarios.name: Sensor Gain Drift Accumulation
scenarios.description: Small per-record gain shift (1.2%) below individual alarm threshold, accumulated via rolling z-test.

scenarios.name: Replay Masking Attack
scenarios.description: Anomalous records replaced with ideal noiseless replicas to hide faults from the learned detector.

scenarios.name: Genuine Records (False Positive Guard)
scenarios.description: All genuine normal telemetry must produce zero FDI flags.
scenarios.detection_mechanism: FDI physics layer (all checks must pass)
